preamble: A radical shift from the open-mid front vowel [ɛ] to the close back rounded vowel [u], involving raising, backing, and rounding.

languageExamples.language: Old High German to Modern German

examples.note: Sporadic raising and backing in certain phonetic contexts, e.g., before certain clusters.

sources: Ladefoged, P. (2001). A Course in Phonetics.
Alkire, T., & Rosen, C. (2010). Romance Philology.
